calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Charles Ramsy, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's witness: Kim Reeder, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Patricia Allen.
Exhibit 1 - Leasing Agreement---------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Fourteen-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 95 Watchman Way, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,085.00
Attorney's Fees and Costs $795.00
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court and to prepare Judgment.

July 21, 2005
Judgment signed.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CHARLES RAMSEY FOR PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY ANGELA CHOI FOR DEFENDANT PATRICIA ALLEN, ALSO PRESENT

ALL PARTIES APPEARED. STIPULATION PENDING. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR.
KEEP TRIAL DATE.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
